properties.entry: SELECT InterestTopic.topic FROM InterestTopic WHERE InterestTopic.term IN (:terms) AND InterestTopic.termType = :termType AND InterestTopic.termWeight >= :termWeight GROUP BY InterestTopic.topic

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY InterestTopic.topic ORDER BY InterestTopic.topicWeight DESC, InterestTopic.termWeight DESC ) AS rank FROM InterestTopic WHERE InterestTopic.termType = :termType AND InterestTopic.topic IN (:topics) ) AS TMP WHERE rank <= :termRankEnd

SELECT term FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY topic ORDER BY topicWeight DESC, termWeight DESC ) AS rowNumber FROM ( SELECT *, RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY InterestTopic.topic ORDER BY InterestTopic.topicWeight DESC, InterestTopic.termWeight DESC ) AS rank FROM InterestTopic WHERE InterestTopic.term NOT IN (:terms) AND InterestTopic.termType = :termType AND InterestTopic.topic IN (:topics) ) AS TMP1 WHERE rank > :termRank1 ORDER BY topicWeight DESC, termWeight DESC ) AS TMP2 WHERE rowNumber <= :termRank2
